name: Apple Whole Grain Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 cups whole wheat bread, stale, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place bread cubes in a large mixing bowl. Add milk and apple juice and toss.
3. Add apples, raisins, lemon peel, cinnamon, and nutmeg to bread cubes.
4. In a medium-size mixing bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
5. Gradually add sugar and vanilla, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Fold egg whites into bread-apple mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2 or 2-quart casserole.
8. Set the casserole in a pan of water and bake for 45 to 50 minutes, or until lightly browned on top and apples are tender.
